name: Marinated Spicy Jerky
recipeIngredient: 8 pounds Beef or caribou round or flank steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all fat off the meat and cut into 1/4-inch thick strips.
2. Mix salt, pepper, chili powder, garlic powder, onion powder, cayenne pepper, liquid smoke, water, soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce together in a bowl.
3. Add the meat to the marinade and cover. Let marinate overnight.
4. Remove the meat from the marinade and pat dry thoroughly with paper towels.
5. Line a cookie sheet with foil and arrange the meat in a single layer on it.
6. Dry at 175°F for 6 or more hours, turning the strips after 3 hours to ensure even drying.
7. Cool completely before bagging the jerky.
